modelName: OC4 Infrastructure Large Target - LLM Uplifted with Uncertainty
modelDescription: An OC4-level state-sponsored APT exploits a VPN zero-day to compromise a major multi-state electric utility, conducts extensive reconnaissance across sprawling IT and OT networks, pre-positions sabotage capabilities in thousands of substations, and executes coordinated breaker manipulation causing widespread multi-day power outages affecting millions of customers during geopolitical escalation.

nodes.name: Successful Attack Rate
nodes.expression: rec * res * ini * exe * per * pri * cre * dis * lat * col * c2 * imp

nodes.name: Privilege Escalation: Token Manipulation
nodes.description: The actor aggregates and stages sensitive data from discovered locations. The data is often compressed into archives on a compromised internal server before exfiltration.

nodes.name: Privilege Escalation
nodes.expression: equalText(tech, 'Token Manipulation') ? tm : (equalText(tech, 'Local Exploit') ? le : proc)

nodes.name: Initial Access
nodes.expression: ia1 + ia2 + ia3 - (ia1 * ia2) - (ia2 * ia3) - (ia3 * ia1) + (ia1 * ia2 * ia3)

nodes.name: Command and Control
nodes.expression: cc1 + cc2 + cc3 - cc1 * cc2 - cc2 * cc3 - cc3 * cc1 + cc1 * cc2 * cc3

nodes.name: Privilege Escalation Technique
nodes.description: Value for XOR node selecting privilege escalation tactic used

nodes.name: Lateral Movement: RDP into EMS servers
Lateral Movement: SMB_WMI into Engineering PCs
Lateral Movement
nodes.expression: lm1 + lm2 + lm3 - (lm1 * lm2) - (lm2 * lm3) - (lm3 * lm1) + (lm1 * lm2 * lm3)
